name: leander-ppt
description: Turn source material (PPTX, Word, outlines, scripts, notes) into a formal editable PPTX deck through the Leander PPT workflow for internal sharing, management reports, product introductions, presales/customer demos, training, and project reviews. Pipeline: brief -> outline -> theme/template -> anchor sample PPTX -> full deck -> rendered visual QA. Uses progressive disclosure through references/, reusable themes/components, and strict self-check gates. No audio, no recording, no React, no automatic HTML-to-PPT conversion.
